title: Open Armor - Fantasy
description: Replaces the visuals of armor sets in game with one that has a fantasy feel to it, showing some of your skin contents
body:
## _Featuring_
- New textures of armor and everything related to armor.
- Text replacements for ```English [US/UK] & Russian/Русский & Japanese/日本語)```
- Want something similar but with a more social feel to it? Check out [Open Armor - Social](https://modrinth.com/project/hots-open-armor-social)!
